sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (input_string String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY input_string;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES ('test1,;\\ test2,;\\ test3,;\\ test4');
SELECT tokens(input_string) AS tokens FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET input_string = 'data1;data2,data3' WHERE input_string = 'test1,;\\ test2,;\\ test3,;\\ test4';
SELECT tokens(input_string) FROM test_table WHERE tokens(input_string)[1] = 'test2';
